name: @aily-project/lib-m5stack-sd
author: M5Stack / ailyProject
description: M5Stack 板载 microSD/TF 卡积木，使用 M5Unified 官方引脚表自动选择 SPI 或 SDMMC，并补充 Tough 官方固定引脚，支持文件、目录、容量与热插拔重试。
description_en: Onboard SD card blocks that select SPI or SDMMC from the official M5Unified pin table, add the official fixed Tough pins, and support files, directories, capacity queries and remount retries.
